title: geracium aureum
intro: Geranium aureum, also known as the bright-leaf geranium, is a perennial plant species native to tropical regions. It has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, particularly in treating menstrual and menopausal symptoms, due to its ability to balance hormonal secretions. The plant has been found to have various health benefits, including reducing inflammation, improving digestion, and acting as an antiseptic. Geranium aureum can be prepared as a herbal remedy in the form of teas, tinctures, and infusions, which are often used to alleviate symptoms of PMS, anxiety, and stress.
